tasks.name: Amazon | A+ Content — Hero Banner Set
tasks.last_comment: Tiz (client, 2h ago): We discussed this on the call last week and still haven't received the revised hero banners. This is now blocking our Prime Day prep — can you confirm exactly when the full set will be delivered? We need at least 48 hours to review internally before the freeze on the 6th.
tasks.reply_draft: Hi Tiz — apologies for the delay on the hero banner set. The revised banners are in final QA now and I'll have the complete set to you by 3 PM IST today, which gives you a clear runway before the 6th freeze. I'll personally confirm here the moment they're live in the shared folder.
tasks.action: Chase Anuvrath for final QA by 1 PM. Escalate to PM Lead if not ready. Post delivery summary the moment banners are shared.

tasks.followup_draft: Hi Tiz — just a gentle follow-up on the storefront refresh. We're still missing the vector logo and the 3 lifestyle photos to get started. As soon as they land, we'll move this into production the same day. If they're delayed, let me know and I'll plan the timeline around it.
